emails.subject: M&A's
emails.body: M&A's Do any of you have any forms or checklists that you use in reviewing proposed transactions to identify labor employment issues as part of the due diligence process? --Lizzette

emails.subject: RE: M&A's
emails.body: RE: M&A's boy, do i To: Cash, Michelle; Sullivan, Kriste; Butcher, Sharon

emails.subject: RE: M&A's
emails.body: And, how might I get them? --Lizzette To: Palmer, Lizzette; Sullivan, Kriste; Butcher, Sharon

emails.subject: RE: M&A's
emails.body: what's it worth to you? To: Cash, Michelle

emails.subject: RE: M&A's
emails.body: guess i could buy your next starbuck's? kriste, is it ok under the code of ethics for michelle to charge me for her mentoring services? --Lizzette To: Palmer, Lizzette
